column1: # Curated semantic labels for cataloged PROT.DAT TIMs, keyed by content
# fingerprint (FNV-1a-64, as recorded by tim_catalog / tim_deep_catalog).
#   coarse visual categories: environment, terrain, foliage, character,
#   precise reverse-engineered pins: menu glyph atlas, main-title sprite sheet,
# A label propagates to every catalog id sharing the fingerprint (duplicate or
# aliased textures), across both the raw and the deep tier. These are our own
# annotations - observations of decoded thumbnails + RE loader-site pins - not
# Sony asset strings or pixel data. The `note` column is human context only.
# --- Coarse visual categories (assigned by thumbnail review) -------------
